problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Pramana.AI: Enterprise Tender Intelligence & Automated Auditing
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tender documents, evaluate eligibility of bidders, and produce explainable evaluation reports using Pramana.AI, a system combining Regex, NLP logic, OCR, and FastAPI.
optimization_claims: 100% auditable, transparent, and legally defensible results
Automation of the tender evaluation pipeline
Elimination of human error in compliance checks
